name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
In stock!!️
30 Montaigne Avenue Small, a must-have for autumn and winter. Crafted from imported black patent leather with a vintage gold letter logo, combining elegance and modern style. Features a multi-compartment interior, practical and stylish. Includes a handle and adjustable leather shoulder strap for various carrying styles. A definite must-have.
size:19*8*9cm
